summary: Iteration 13: verified (1) NEW lead-search functionality on GET /admin/leads (backend 10/10 pytest + UI flow) and (2) analytics bounce_rate fix is correctly computed AND rendered. Backend: 10/10 tests pass on the deployed preview. Frontend: lead search input, debounce, header-text update, clear button, and 'Submit Test Lead' all work; Analytics tab renders a live campaign with clicks=2 and bounce_rate=50% (not 100%) — confirming the BOUNCE_EXPR fix is end-to-end correct.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /admin/leads search path is well-implemented: phone-digit search uses the new phone_digits column (now correctly populated by POST /leads), regex is escaped (no ReDoS), case-insensitive, ignores date range. Solid.

Analytics by_campaign filter (server.py:1844) hides any campaign_id NOT in cfg.live_campaigns. The 'Sync names' button rotated live_campaigns and removed the example ID '14391026804' from the review request — current live IDs are 23950910607, 23953153395, 23956437547, 23963716929, 23963918043. Future testers MUST GET /admin/config and pick a currently-live campaign ID; treating '14391026804' as evergreen will silently produce empty by_campaign rows and look like a bounce-rate regression. Worth documenting.
BOUNCE_EXPR (server.py:1794) correctly excludes engaged/converted/visits>1; verified end-to-end at UI: 2 clicks + 1 engaged => 50% bounce in the dashboard.

Frontend AdminDashboard.jsx Leads tab debounces search at ~350ms (LGTM); placeholder 'Search name or phone…' present; clear button (lead-search-clear) toggles correctly. Header copy switches between 'Search results for "X"' and 'Leads submitted in the selected range.'
test_credentials: Owner from /app/memory/test_credentials.md (username='owner', password='LemonPros2026!'). Bearer token via POST /api/admin/login.
seed_data_creation: Backend test creates one QASearch/Tester<ts> lead (cleaned up via DELETE /api/admin/leads/{id}) and two clicks (qa-it13-<ts>-an-1/2) on a live campaign with gclid + Chrome UA. UI test additionally seeded clicks on '23950910607' (current live Pmax campaign). All QA-tagged clicks (8) and the QA lead (1) cleaned up via mongo direct delete at end of run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both features verified working at the API AND the UI layer. CRITICAL GOTCHA for future testers seeding analytics data: (a) Use a non-bot User-Agent header on POST /api/track/click (curl default is dropped). (b) Include a gclid on the click — /admin/analytics calls _auto_clean_bot_clicks() which deletes any click with campaign_id but no gclid/wbraid/gbraid. (c) MOST IMPORTANT: live_campaigns is rotated by the 'Sync names' button. Always GET /api/admin/config and pick a CURRENTLY-live campaign_id (e.g. 23950910607 at the time of this run); old IDs (14391026804) will be filtered out and produce empty by_campaign rows. Lead search works for full/partial name, email substrings, full phone digits (8185559912), and partial digits (5559912). phone_digits is now stored on POST /leads via _re.sub(\D, '', phone).
rca of the issue: Initial UI bounce-rate assertion failed because '14391026804' (from review_request) is no longer in cfg.live_campaigns after a re-sync. server.py:1844 hides non-live campaigns from by_campaign. Re-seeded on a currently-live ID (23950910607) and the dashboard immediately rendered Clicks=2, Bounce Rate=50% — confirming the BOUNCE_EXPR fix is correctly wired all the way to the UI. The backend pytest used 14391026804 (which luckily was still live in cfg at test time — but the test should be hardened to fetch a live campaign id from /admin/config in future iterations to avoid this fragility).
